meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: The No-Code Founder's Blueprint
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between vision and revenue. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch your SaaS without writing manual code.
content.answer_block: Stop letting technical debt stall your launch. By leveraging the Antigravity project template alongside Claude Code, you bypass manual syntax hurdles. This workflow automates backend scaffolding and UI integration, allowing you to focus purely on business logic, market validation, and revenue-generating features instead of low-level infrastructure.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with 'great ideas' that never survived the blank IDE screen. You have the vision, the market insight, and the drive, but the technical barrier feels like a wall of fire. You don't need a CS degree; you need an architecture that moves at the speed of your ambition.

Antigravity transforms that wall into a bridge. By pairing a robust project template with the contextual awareness of Claude Code, you shift from being a coder to an orchestrator. This is how high-growth founders ship MVPs in days, not months, while maintaining the scalability of a production-ready application.

steps.title: Define Your Revenue Model
steps.description: Before scaffolding, clarify your monetization strategy to ensure the template matches your data needs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a project architecture blueprint for a [SaaS Type] that focuses on [Monetization Model]. Define the core database schema and user authentication flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project with core authentication and stripe integration'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Foundation
steps.description: Use the Antigravity template to generate the folder structure and configuration files.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the starter project structure using the Antigravity secure-template standard for a [SaaS Type].
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold project directory using antigravity best practices'

steps.title: Integrate Business Logic
steps.description: Inject your specific unique value proposition into the scaffolded backend.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft the API endpoints for [Core Feature] ensuring data integrity and scalability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement API endpoints for core features and attach to database'

steps.title: Automate UI-UX Mapping
steps.description: Use Claude to translate your functional requirements into a responsive, high-converting interface.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the front-end components for a dashboard that displays [Key Metric] for users.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate react components with tailwind css for user dashboard'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Finalize environmental variables and trigger a production-ready build.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the project for deployment readiness and generate a deployment checklist.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'verify project build and prepare for deployment to cloud provider'

pro_tips: Always define your database relationships in the prompt before generating code; schema migration is the #1 cause of MVP failure.
Use Claude Code's 'review' feature on every PR to catch potential security vulnerabilities before they hit production.
Prioritize 'Stripe-first' development; build your payment flow before you build your vanity features to prove market viability.
Keep your prompt context slim by splitting your project into modular feature files rather than one monolithic file.
Leverage the Antigravity cache to save state between sessions, reducing redundant token usage and lowering costs.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, implement a feedback loop with your first 10 users and use Claude Code to iterate based on their specific friction points.
content.conversion_block: Don't let technical intimidation define your success. Use these tools to reclaim your time and focus on scaling your vision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
